setupChecklist.title: Barrier and isolation check
setupChecklist.detail: Light handles, bracket tray, and suction lines sealed before seating.

setupChecklist.title: Instrument zoning
setupChecklist.detail: Place prep burs by sequence, mirror forward, and orient handpiece tubing left.

setupChecklist.title: Material reserve
setupChecklist.detail: Seat hemostatic, cord, and provisional material in rear slab lane.
